content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 CNC positions already open and mostly entered on day 4 of the experiment. Multiple names (PNBHOUSING, TORNTPOWER, NESTLEIND, AUBANK, HINDUNILVR, ADANIPOWER) are up sharply intraday — priority is risk management, not new entries. India VIX at 18.6 and crude/rupee headwinds keep risk elevated. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 73.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry at 81.50, CMP 77.78 (-4.6%). Q4 results were strong (+35% PAT YoY, GNPA 1.45%), PSU Bank index outperforming. Thesis intact. Setting SL at 73 (just below 4-day swing low ~72.30, ~6% from entry, within max SL range) and target 88 (above 52w high breakout extension). R:R from CMP = 5/4.78 ≈ 1:1.05 — marginal but thesis-backed. Exit if SL hit or target not achieved in 10 days."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1120.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1006 (+2.2%), up 11% today on Q4 beat (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Trail SL to 955 (just below today's low 981 with buffer, ~3% from CMP, locks loss to ~3% from entry). Target 1120 (below 52w high 1141.90, consensus TP 1143). Thesis strong, momentum confirmed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, CMP 124.28 vs entry 125.10. Gold consolidating after record-high rally; still supported by INR weakness and geopolitical risk. SL at 119.50 (~4.5% below entry, below SMA20 at 121.92). Target 135 (between current and 52w high 148). Keep as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1640.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1650, CMP 1701 (+3%). Stock broke out to new 52w high with 2.3x volume. Trail SL to 1640 (near breakeven, just below breakout and prior 52w high of 1640). Target 1820 (~10% from entry, in line with analyst TP range 2000-2300 but conservative near-term). Q4 results May 13 is event risk — plan to exit before. Note: power cluster exposure (TORNTPOWER + ADANIPOWER + NTPC) already ~12% of book, DO NOT add more."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1370.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1412.94, CMP 1411.40 (~flat). Stock jumped 9.56% today on Q4 beat (PAT +27%, volume-led growth). SL at 1370 (~3% below entry, below today's low 1382). Target 1500 (~6% above entry). Defensive FMCG outperformer. Valuation is rich (P/E 73x) so keep SL tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1049.05, CMP 1055.50 (+0.5%). Stock at fresh 52w high, provisional Q4 strong (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Q4 results April 27 (binary event in 4 days). SL at 1015 (~3.2% below entry, below today's low 1035). Target 1140 (near Bollinger upper + consensus TP 978-1175). Highest conviction among book due to universal bank scarcity value."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 745.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 681, CMP 680.50 (~flat). Q4 results April 29 (binary event in 6 days). 3.7x volume surge today suggests positioning. SL at 655 (~3.8% below entry, below 5-day range). Target 745 (consensus broker range 700-770). Plan: review post-Q4 and exit if miss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Entry 2372, CMP 2370 (~flat). Up 6.22% today as FMCG defensive. Q4 results April 30 (event in 7 days). SL at 2290 (~3.5% below entry). Target 2520 (analyst range 2300-2600). Risk-reward ~1:1.8."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 404.50, CMP 403.15 (~flat). Broke out to 52w high 400.85. Relative outperformer in power pack with ESG upgrade + EDF nuclear MoU. SL at 388 (~4% below entry, below SMA20). Target 430 (upper analyst target). Q4 May 15."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Entry 214, CMP 214.19 (flat). Stock at all-time high, +44% in April — profit-booking risk elevated. Q3 PAT actually fell -18.9% YoY. SL at 202 (~5.6% below entry, below today's low 212.53 with buffer and below 5-day support). Target 235 (~10% upside, conservative given extended move). Q4 concall April 29 — plan to exit before/after depending on print. Shooting star on 2026-04-20 is a caution flag."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 73.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-Q4 beat. SL set below recent swing low; give it room to rebound."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong momentum, trail SL near today's low to lock breakeven+ and let winner run toward 1120."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, maintain with protective SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1640.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to 52w high confirmed with volume. Trail SL to breakout level (near breakeven)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1370.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, but rich valuation limits further upside; keep tight SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Highest conviction name, Q4 results April 27. SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Ahead of Q4 April 29 — tight SL on binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive FMCG. Q4 April 30 — tight SL on event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Relative outperformer, 52w high breakout, hold for target with protective SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended rally + shooting star signal. Tight SL to protect against mean reversion. Exit before Q4 concall if needed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIRAMALFIN, DATAPATTNS, ELECON, DEEPAKNTR, CESC, IEX, DRREDDY, AUROPHARMA, CIPLA, GAIL — all interesting but NOT actionable today given 79% deployment. DATAPATTNS at all-time high with rich valuation — avoid chasing. IEX has negative regulatory overhang (market coupling draft) — avoid. HCLTECH falling knife post-Q4 — monitor for base formation. INFY results post-market — monitor tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed on day 4 of a 180-day experiment — too much too fast. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) = ~10-11% of capital which is within tolerance but at ceiling. Banking/financials cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) = ~29% of capital — at the edge of the 35% sector cap when counting broad financials. NO new entries today. Priority for coming sessions: let winners (PNBHOUSING, TORNTPOWER, AUBANK) run with trailing SLs, be strict on MAHABANK recovery, and prepare to cut event-driven names (GRANULES/HINDUNILVR/AUBANK/ADANIPOWER) if Q4 prints disappoint over Apr 27-30. Cash available is only INR 14.5K — effectively no dry powder, so capital preservation on existing book is paramount."
}
